description: Structured pipeline for writing high-quality Related Work sections with brainstorm-based requirements and per-task output isolation

brainstorm_agent.input: User's raw input (text or draft file)
brainstorm_agent.output: UserRequirement (structured requirements for all downstream agents)

topic_specialist.output: Search Task Document (keywords, venues, time range)

search_agent.output: Candidate literature list (title, abstract, contribution, source)

archivist.role: 文献档案员 (真理守门人)
archivist.output: Structured literature archive with DOI/arXiv validation, abstract anchors, and status tagging

v3_rules.metadata_force: DOI (10.XXXX/...) or arXiv ID (YYMM.NNNNN) is MANDATORY
v3_rules.abstract_anchoring: Extract 1-2 core sentences verbatim from original abstract as ONLY legal source

synthesis_writer.constraint: MUST use only Abstract Anchors as factual source material

fact_checker.output: Audit report + Final corrected draft + dois_to_destroy list

v3_checks.existence_check: Validate DOI format (10.XXXX/...) and arXiv ID (YYMM.NNNNN); flag citation keys as fake DOIs
v3_checks.semantic_reconciliation: Sentence-level comparison of draft claims vs Abstract Anchors
v3_checks.hallucination_detection: Any claim not in Abstract Anchor → HALLUCINATION → force rewrite
v3_checks.destroy_notification: Output dois_to_destroy list for Cleanup Agent to physically remove

cleanup_agent.role: 环境清理官 (动态内存回收)

v3_rules.redundancy_pruning: Delete stale drafts immediately after audit pass
v3_rules.physical_destruction: Permanently remove records flagged by Auditor
v3_rules.version_locking: Generate Fact Table as the ONLY legal source in Context window
